meta.siteTitle: Keni Rides, Premium Motorcycle Adventures in Morocco
meta.siteDescription: Rent premium adventure motorcycles in Morocco. BMW GS, Yamaha Ténéré, Honda and Suzuki, ride the Sahara, Atlas Mountains and both coasts with Keni Rides.

home.title: Keni Rides, Premium Motorcycle Adventures in Morocco

home.heroLead: From the dunes of the Sahara to the peaks of the Atlas, explore Morocco on a premium adventure motorcycle. Expedition-ready machines, local expertise, and the freedom of the open road.
home.marquee: Sahara Desert ◆ Atlas Mountains ◆ Mediterranean Coast ◆ Atlantic Coast ◆ Marrakech ◆ Merzouga ◆ Chefchaouen ◆ Essaouira ◆

fleet.lead: Expedition-ready motorcycles, maintained to the highest standard. From the mighty BMW GS to nimble desert singles, there is a perfect bike for every rider.

why.title: More Than a Rental
why.lead: We are riders first. Every detail, from the bikes to the route advice, is built around one goal: your perfect Moroccan adventure.

features.title: Expedition-Grade Fleet
features.desc: BMW, Yamaha, Honda and Suzuki adventure machines, fully serviced before every rental, with crash protection and luggage options fitted.

features.title: Insurance Included
features.desc: Every motorcycle comes with third-party liability insurance, and we help you check your travel cover before you set off.

features.title: Delivery Across Morocco
features.desc: Pick up in Marrakech or Casablanca, or have your bike delivered to Tangier, Fez and beyond, straight to your hotel.

features.title: 24/7 Road Support
features.desc: Breakdown far from base? We bring you an equivalent motorcycle or an alternative solution so your trip never stops.

features.title: Born-Here Route Knowledge
features.desc: Founded by a rider who has explored every region of Morocco since childhood. Get insider routes you won't find on any map app.

features.title: Full Riding Gear
features.desc: Helmets, gloves, jackets and waterproof suits available as extras, arrive with just your licence and sense of adventure.

destinations.lead: Few places on earth pack this much variety into a single ride. Desert, high mountains and two coastlines, all within days of each other.

items.name: Sahara Desert
items.desc: Golden dunes, oasis valleys and nights under a million stars.

items.name: Atlas Mountains
items.desc: Legendary passes, Berber villages and switchbacks for days.

items.name: Mediterranean Coast
items.desc: Turquoise coves and cliff roads from Tangier to Saïdia.

items.name: Atlantic Coast
items.desc: Wild surf towns, fishing ports and endless ocean horizons.

founder.title: The Adventure at the Heart of Keni Rides
founder.lead: Keni Rides was founded by Mohamed (Simo) Bennis, a passionate rider who has explored every region of Morocco since childhood. His dream: to let travelers experience the real Morocco through authentic motorcycle adventures.
founder.caption: Mohamed “Simo” Bennis, Founder

checklist.text: from Sahara pistes to Rif coast switchbacks.
honest advice on bikes, routes and seasons.

how.title: On the Road in Three Steps
how.lead: No online payment, no complicated process. Request, confirm, ride.

steps.title: Choose Your Bike
steps.desc: Pick your motorcycle and your pickup & return dates. Minimum rental is just 2 days.

steps.title: Send Your Request
steps.desc: Fill in the booking form. Our team contacts you shortly to confirm availability and details.

steps.title: Ride Morocco
steps.desc: Pay a 20% deposit to reserve, the rest at pickup. Then the country is yours to explore.

stories.title: Trusted by Riders Worldwide
stories.videosLead: Real riders tell their Morocco adventure, in their own words.

cta.lead: Choose your machine, pick your dates, and leave the rest to us. No online payment, just a simple request and a confirmation call.

reviews.quote: The Ténéré was flawless and Simo's route through the Atlas was the best week of riding in my life. World-class operation.
reviews.name: Markus K.

reviews.quote: Bike delivered to our hotel in Marrakech, spotless and ready. When I dropped it in the sand near Merzouga, help arrived the same day.
reviews.name: Sophie L.

reviews.quote: First time off-road and they set me up on the perfect CRF250 with full gear. Patient, professional and genuinely passionate people.
reviews.name: James R.

reviews.quote: Two GS 1200s for ten days, Casablanca to the desert and back. Flawless machines and Simo answered every message within minutes.
reviews.name: Andrés V.

reviews.quote: As a solo female traveler I felt completely supported. Great bike, honest advice, and the World Raid handled the dunes like a dream.
reviews.name: Emma N.

reviews.quote: Ténéré 700 delivered to Fez, returned in Marrakech. The flexibility made our two-week loop possible. Cannot recommend enough.
reviews.name: Paolo T.

motorcyclesPage.heroLead: Expedition-ready machines, from the mighty BMW GS 1200 Adventure to featherweight desert singles. Every bike fully serviced, insured, and ready for Moroccan roads and pistes.

items.title: Minimum 2 Days

items.desc: Secure your bike with a 20% deposit, the balance is paid at pickup. Security deposit is authorized, never charged.

items.title: Delivery Available

cta.lead: Tell us your experience level, your route and your dates, we'll recommend the perfect machine for your adventure.

included.title: Always included
included.text: Third-party liability insurance · Helmet & gloves (mandatory, available as extras) · 24/7 road assistance with replacement bike if repair is impossible · Route advice from local experts.

cta.lead: These roads are waiting. Pick your motorcycle and start writing your own story.

testimonialsPage.heroLead: Don't take our word for it, hear it straight from the riders who lived it.

cta.lead: Join hundreds of riders who found their perfect Moroccan adventure with Keni Rides.

aboutPage.heroTitle: The Adventure at the Heart of Keni Rides

founder.title: Born to Ride Morocco
founder.caption: Mohamed “Simo” Bennis, Founder
paragraphs: Keni Rides was founded by Mohamed (Simo) Bennis, a passionate motorcycle rider and explorer. Since childhood he has travelled across Morocco, discovering every region of the country, every pass, every piste, every hidden village café worth stopping at.

From the golden dunes of the Sahara Desert to the snow-capped peaks of the Atlas Mountains, from the turquoise coves of the Mediterranean to the wild surf of the Atlantic Coast, Simo has ridden it all, in every season.

His dream became a company: a place where travelers experience Morocco not from a tour-bus window, but from the saddle of a great motorcycle, with the freedom to explore and the backup of someone who knows every kilometre.

items.name: Sahara Desert
items.desc: Merzouga, Zagora, and the pistes between the ergs.

items.name: Atlas Mountains
items.desc: Tizi n'Tichka, Tizi n'Test and a hundred nameless passes.

items.name: Mediterranean Coast
items.desc: The Rif, Chefchaouen, and the cliff roads to Al Hoceima.

items.name: Atlantic Coast
items.desc: Essaouira, Taghazout and the endless ocean highway south.

items.title: Authenticity
items.desc: Real Moroccan adventures designed by someone who grew up on these roads, not imported tour templates.

items.title: Safety First
items.desc: Meticulously maintained machines, mandatory quality gear, insurance on every bike and 24/7 assistance.

items.title: Rider Brotherhood
items.desc: You arrive as a customer and leave as a friend. Expect route tips, tea stops, and a WhatsApp reply at any hour.

cta.lead: Simo and the team are ready to build your perfect Moroccan adventure.

faqPage.heroLeadStart: Everything you need to know before you ride. Still unsure?

items.q: How do I book a motorcycle?
items.a: Choose your motorcycle and your pickup & return dates, then send the booking form on the bike's page. Our team contacts you shortly to confirm availability. A 20% deposit secures your reservation and the balance is paid at pickup, no online payment is required.

items.q: Can I ride anywhere in Morocco?
items.a: Yes, from the Sahara to the Atlas and both coasts, the country is yours. We simply ask you to share your planned route so we can advise on road conditions, fuel stops and seasons, and make sure assistance can reach you anywhere.

Four things: a motorcycle licence issued more than 2 years ago, your passport or national ID, a hotel address or proof of accommodation, and a credit card under the renter's name. Minimum age is 21. Details on the rental conditions page.
Every motorcycle includes third-party liability insurance. In addition, personal travel insurance that covers motorcycle riding is mandatory, we may ask for proof before the rental begins.

Yes. Marrakech / Casablanca: €50 delivery, €50 pickup. Tangier / Fez: €100 delivery, €100 pickup. Other destinations are quoted individually. Available Monday-Sunday, by appointment, with 2 days notice.
Helmets, gloves, jackets and waterproof suits are available as optional extras. Note that a helmet and gloves are mandatory on every rental, bring your own or add ours.

items.q: What happens in case of breakdown?
items.a: Call us, any day, any hour. If the motorcycle can't be repaired quickly, we provide an equivalent motorcycle, an alternative solution, or a rental discount if necessary. Your adventure keeps rolling.

Yes, if you're 21 or older and have held your motorcycle licence for more than 2 years. For newer off-road riders we recommend the friendly Suzuki DR250 or Honda CRF250, and we're happy to suggest gentle routes.

The 20% reservation deposit and the balance can be paid by credit card or cash. The security deposit (€1000-€2000 depending on the motorcycle) is authorized on your card but never charged unless there is damage.

faqTextPlain: Choose your motorcycle and dates on our website and send the booking form. Our team contacts you shortly to confirm availability. A 20% deposit secures your reservation and the balance is paid at pickup. No online payment is required.
Yes, from the Sahara to the Atlas and both coasts. We simply ask that you tell us your planned route so we can advise on road conditions and set up assistance coverage.
A motorcycle driving licence issued more than 2 years ago, your passport or national ID, a hotel address or proof of accommodation, and a credit card under the renter's name. Minimum age is 21.
All motorcycles include third-party liability insurance. Personal travel insurance covering motorcycle riding is mandatory and proof may be requested before rental.
Yes. Delivery or pickup in Marrakech and Casablanca costs €50 each; Tangier and Fez cost €100 each. Other locations are quoted on request. Delivery is available Monday to Sunday with 2 days notice.
Helmets, gloves, jackets and waterproof suits are available as optional extras. Helmet and gloves are mandatory for every rental.
Call us any time. If the motorcycle cannot be repaired quickly we provide an equivalent motorcycle, an alternative solution, or a rental discount if necessary. You are never left stranded.

Yes, as long as you are 21 or older and have held a motorcycle licence for more than 2 years. We have friendly lightweight bikes like the Suzuki DR250 and Honda CRF250 that are ideal for building confidence.
The 20% reservation deposit and balance can be paid by credit card or cash. The security deposit (€1000-€2000 depending on the motorcycle) is authorized on your credit card but never charged.
faqPage.readFinePrint: Read the fine print, it's short and fair.

cta.lead: Questions answered? The Atlas is calling.

conditionsPage.heroLead: Clear, fair, and rider-friendly. Here is everything you need to know before you book.

minimumRental.title: Minimum Rental
minimumRental.body: All rentals have a minimum duration of 2 days. Morocco deserves at least that, and so does the bike.

age.title: Age
age.body: The minimum age to rent any motorcycle is 21 years.

license.title: Driving License
license.body: You must hold a motorcycle license issued more than 2 years ago. An International Driving Permit is recommended alongside your national license.

deposit.title: Security Deposit
deposit.body: A security deposit of €1000-€2000 applies, depending on the motorcycle. The deposit is authorized but not charged, the hold is simply released after the bike is returned in good condition.
list: Charged to a credit card in the renter's name (pre-authorization), never cash

reservation.title: Reservation
reservation.body: A 20% deposit confirms your reservation. The remaining balance is paid at pickup, by credit card or cash. No full online payment, ever.

documents.title: Required Documents
list: Driving License (motorcycle category)
Passport or National ID
Hotel address or proof of accommodation
Credit card under the renter's name

delivery.title: Pickup & Delivery
list: Pickup and return only by appointment
Available Monday-Sunday with 2-day notice

equipment.title: Safety Equipment
list: Helmet (mandatory)
Gloves (mandatory)
Jacket
Waterproof suit
equipment.note: You are welcome to bring your own gear, helmet and gloves must be worn at all times.

insurance.title: Insurance
list: All motorcycles include third-party liability insurance
Travel insurance covering motorcycle riding is mandatory
Proof of insurance may be requested before rental

breakdown.title: Technical Problems
breakdown.intro: Our machines are maintained meticulously, but adventure is adventure. If a technical problem occurs:
list: Contact us immediately, we operate 24/7 assistance
We first attempt a quick local repair through our network of trusted mechanics
If repair is impossible, we provide an equivalent motorcycle
If no equivalent is available, we arrange an alternative solution
Where appropriate, a rental discount is applied for lost riding time

terms.title: General Terms
list: Renter responsibility, the renter is responsible for the motorcycle from pickup to return, and must ride respecting Moroccan traffic law.
Damages, damage beyond normal wear is assessed at return and deducted from the security deposit up to its limit.
Traffic fines, any fines or penalties incurred during the rental period are the renter's responsibility.
Illegal use prohibited, competition, paid passenger transport, subletting, or any illegal activity voids the rental agreement immediately.
Return conditions, return the motorcycle at the agreed time and place, with the same fuel level, in the same condition as delivered. Late or remote returns must be agreed in advance.

cta.lead: Any question about the conditions? We answer fast.

contactPage.heroLead: Call, WhatsApp or send a message, we answer fast, seven days a week.
contactPage.mapCaption: Exact pickup point shared after booking confirmation.

bmw-gs1200-adventure.tagline: The legend of world travel. Cross the Atlas without breaking a sweat.
bmw-gs1200-adventure.terrain: Long distance · Desert pistes · Mountain passes
bmw-gs1200-adventure.description: The GS 1200 Adventure is the benchmark of adventure touring. With its huge 30-litre tank, electronic suspension and effortless boxer torque, it devours Moroccan highways and desert pistes alike. The perfect machine for riders who want to cross the country in comfort and style.

yamaha-tenere-700-world-raid.tagline: Rally DNA with twin tanks, born for the Sahara.
yamaha-tenere-700-world-raid.terrain: Sahara crossings · Rally pistes · Technical off-road
yamaha-tenere-700-world-raid.description: The World Raid takes the beloved Ténéré 700 and adds twin 23-litre tanks, longer-travel suspension and a rally cockpit. It is the closest you can get to a Dakar machine with a licence plate, ideal for deep desert expeditions.

yamaha-tenere-700.tagline: The modern icon of African adventure riding.
yamaha-tenere-700.description: Light, torquey and nearly indestructible, the Ténéré 700 is the go-to adventure bike for Morocco. Agile enough for Atlas switchbacks, stable enough for long desert stretches, a true do-it-all machine.

bmw-f800gs-adventure.tagline: Long-range comfort with genuine off-road ability.
bmw-f800gs-adventure.terrain: Long distance · Gravel roads · Dunes edges
bmw-f800gs-adventure.description: The F800GS Adventure blends BMW touring comfort with a chassis that genuinely loves dirt. Its 24-litre tank and relaxed ergonomics make it a favourite for week-long loops through the South of Morocco.

suzuki-dr650.description: Simple, light and famously unbreakable, the DR650 has carried travellers around the planet. It handles sand, rocks and tarmac with equal ease, the definitive go-anywhere Morocco bike.

suzuki-dr400.tagline: Light enough to play, strong enough to travel.
suzuki-dr400.description: The DR-Z400 is the sweet spot between a trail toy and a travel bike. Superb in technical terrain and dunes, it rewards riders who want to explore the wilder corners of Morocco.

honda-crf250.tagline: Effortless off-road confidence for every rider.
honda-crf250.description: Light, friendly and impossible to dislike, the CRF250 makes off-road riding accessible to everyone. Perfect for day trips into the hills and for riders taking their first steps off the tarmac.

suzuki-dr200.tagline: The easiest way to start your Moroccan adventure.
suzuki-dr200.description: Small, simple and confidence-inspiring, the DR250 is the gentlest introduction to adventure riding. Low seat, light weight, and a surprisingly long range, explore at your own pace.
